note: Initialized VibeGeometry with Epiphany-style persistence surfaces adapted to Blender 5.0+ geometry-node scene generation.

Geometry Script add-on is installed under Blender 5.1 and imports headlessly. A trivial cube node group built successfully in Blender 5.1.1; the documented grid().mesh_to_points() chain failed with NoneType callable, so Geometry Script should be treated as promising but each idiom must be smoke-tested against the installed Blender/add-on pair.

Local Geometry Script 5.1 generated docs are the authoritative node-signature source for this workspace. The prior grid().mesh_to_points() probe failed because grid() returns a result object with mesh and uv_map; the valid chain is grid(...).mesh.mesh_to_points(...).

Public Geometry Nodes learning material is mostly screenshots, videos, and downloadable .blend files. VibeGeometry should build durable Geometry Script knowledge by inspecting source .blend node groups, mapping one graph at a time in prose, then recreating and smoke-testing with local Geometry Script 5.1 signatures.

Completed first Geometry Nodes translation corpus entry: inspected Shriinivas/cartesian.blend NodeGroup.001, mapped its curve/vector field flow, recreated it as examples/geometry_script/shriinivas_cartesian_helper.py, and smoke-tested generation/save/reinspection in Blender 5.1.1. Generated node groups need fake users or real users before saving.

Verified translated Shriinivas cartesian helper behavior against source NodeGroup.001 by wrapping both helpers as Curve+Vector -> Set Position -> Curve to Mesh and comparing evaluated mesh vertices. Test used Count=25, Start=(-0.45,0,0), End=(0.45,0,0), r=0.6, Value=1.25; source and translation both produced 200 vertices with max delta 0.0.

Translated and verified all four inspected Shriinivas/cartesian.blend graph groups: helper, line, parabola, and circle. Verification compares evaluated meshes in Blender 5.1.1; helper/line/parabola match direct vertex order with max delta 0.0, circle matches sorted vertex set with max sorted delta 0.0.

Reverted direct AppData Geometry Script surgery. Cloned upstream Geometry Script into ignored external/geometry-script, committed local branch vibegeometry/blender-5-nested-tree-groups with nested @tree group fix, stored patch under patches/geometry-script, and added setup_geometry_script_clone.ps1 plus loader so VibeGeometry uses the repo-local patched clone.

Translated and verified Shriinivas/piechart.blend small graph family: NodeGroup -> VG Pie Segment and Pie Chart -> VG Pie Chart. Segment and chart evaluated mesh comparisons both passed in Blender 5.1.1 with sorted max vertex delta 0.0. Doctrine added: reusable groups can pass invisible scalar state such as End angle alongside visible geometry.

Translated and verified Shriinivas/fieldvalue.blend Digit At scalar helper as VG Digit At. Verification wraps source and translation by driving Mesh Line.Count and matches four number/position cases, including zero output. Doctrine added: value-only node groups need geometry-producing verification harnesses.

Extended fieldvalue translation with Create Decimal -> VG Create Decimal. Verified against source by comparing evaluated dot geometry: both source and translation produce 32 vertices with sorted max vertex delta 0.0. Doctrine added: tiny glyph marks such as decimal points should be isolated as named reusable parts when they carry stable display intent.
